meta.display_name: Cross-Department Performance Improvement Plan Follow-Up for Priya Sharma

task: Sarah Liu's email flags that Priya Sharma's 60-day PIP checkpoint is due this week. Look up Priya's HRIS record to determine whether she's still in her probation period. If she is, schedule a 30-minute probation review this week with Sarah Liu, James Peterson, and Marcus Chen. If she's not, schedule a 30-minute PIP checkpoint with just Sarah Liu and James Peterson. Before updating Priya's performance rating, reach out to James Peterson via Chat to confirm what performance rating he recommends for Priya based on his cross-department observations—use whatever rating he provides. Also message Marcus Chen via Chat to get the specific meeting title he wants used for the calendar invite. Once you have both pieces of information, schedule the meeting using Marcus Chen's preferred title, update Priya's performance rating per James Peterson's recommendation, message Sarah via Chat to confirm which path we're taking, and email James a heads-up about the scheduled meeting.

agent_profile_overrides.secret: I have been closely tracking Priya Sharma's work on the data pipeline project from my side. Based on my cross-department observations, I recommend her performance rating be set to 'Needs Improvement'. She has not met the integration milestones we agreed on, and the error rates remain unacceptable.
I want the calendar invite for any meeting related to Priya Sharma's PIP or probation review to be titled 'Cross-Department Performance Review – Priya Sharma'. Please use that exact title.

seed_emails.subject: PIP Escalation – Priya Sharma
seed_emails.body_text:
Hi HR,

I wanted to flag that Priya Sharma's 60-day PIP checkpoint is coming up this week, and I have serious concerns about her progress. She has not met the deliverable milestones we outlined at the start of the plan — specifically, her data pipeline error rate is still above the threshold we set, and she's missed two of the three documentation deadlines.

James Peterson has been involved as a cross-department stakeholder on the data pipeline project Priya supports, so he should be looped in on next steps.

Can you check whether Priya is still within her probation period? That will affect whether we need a broader probation review or a standard PIP checkpoint. If she's on probation, I'd like Marcus Chen included in the discussion as well since he oversees the broader team structure.

Please set up the appropriate meeting this week and let me know which path we're taking.

Thanks,
Sarah
